strategies.name: Fast monster B
strategies.description: Hit B quickly through monster.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: rush B monster smoke bridge flash over

meta.purpose: Beat B setup and get onto site before full rotate

strategies.name: Monster short split
strategies.description: Pressure B from monster and short.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Overwhelm B from two directions and cut heaven support

strategies.name: Connector control
strategies.description: Take connector to open map options.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Gain central pathing into B or A later

strategies.name: Long short A
strategies.description: Split A from long and short.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: long + short go A smoke truck

meta.purpose: Pressure A from two routes while blocking truck line
goodWhen: you can reach long or bathrooms

strategies.name: Fake A to B
strategies.description: Show A utility then end B through monster.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: [fake] long smoke A go B monster

meta.purpose: Pull one or two defenders off B before the real hit
goodWhen: enemy rotates quickly on A utility
notes: do not die in long fake

strategies.name: B site execute
strategies.description: Commit to B with basic support smokes.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Cut key B support lanes and force anchor fights
goodWhen: you already have monster or short presence
notes: pillar and barrels still need clearing

strategies.name: A long contact
strategies.description: Take long and pressure A without much noise.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Catch A players before full rotate call

strategies.name: Fast B burst
strategies.description: Quick B burst through monster with flash support.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Overrun B before support arrives
goodWhen: you want a simple high-tempo call

strategies.name: Delayed A long
strategies.description: Wait around connector/long and hit A after one minute.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide connector till 1:00 then go A smoke truck + bank

meta.purpose: Punish early bathroom pushes and late A under-rotation

strategies.name: Bathrooms to A
strategies.description: Take bathrooms and finish A through map control.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take bathrooms then long + short go A smoke truck

meta.purpose: Build a safer A finish around space advantage

strategies.name: Connector to B split
strategies.description: Use connector timing with monster into B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 connector 3 monster smoke heaven go B

meta.purpose: Hit B from multiple paths and break pillar setups

strategies.name: Silent bathrooms A
strategies.description: Walk bathrooms and burst A late.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: [silent] bathrooms walk then swing A smoke truck

meta.purpose: Catch A defenders before full rotate warning

strategies.name: Fountain control
strategies.description: Contest fountain and early map space.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Deny easy bathroom and connector entry
notes: do not overextend into held lines

strategies.name: Triple B hold
strategies.description: Open with heavier B presence.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Shut down repeated monster and short pressure
goodWhen: you have read on early B paths
notes: rotate one out if no contact

strategies.name: Monster push
strategies.description: Push monster for early info or control.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Punish passive B defaults and get quick read

strategies.name: A crossfire
strategies.description: Layered A hold around site and support lanes.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Trade well against long/short A pressure
notes: truck and bank roles should be clear

strategies.name: B stack
strategies.description: Gamble extra players on B.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Punish repeated B site endings

strategies.name: A retake
strategies.description: Delay A and retake with utility.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Avoid dying into truck/bank smoke sets

strategies.name: Connector control
strategies.description: Use connector as a central defensive space.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Read rotations early and deny free B split pathing

strategies.name: Long push
strategies.description: Take long aggressively for info.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Punish passive long starts and learn A bias fast

strategies.name: Save setup
strategies.description: Compact economy-conscious defense.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Preserve rifles and avoid early isolated losses

strategies.name: Bathrooms passive
strategies.description: Hold bathrooms from safer angles.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Delay A map control without risking early duel losses

strategies.name: Short anti-rush
strategies.description: Prepare for fast B short pressure.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Delay a fast split toward B until rotates arrive

strategies.name: Party info
strategies.description: Use party side to learn T spread.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Get early read on bathroom/long intent safely
goodWhen: you need A information without full push
